prompt: Write pricing page copy for PaySync, a multi-currency business account platform for Singapore SMEs expanding into SEA markets. Three tiers: Free (1 currency, 50 transactions/mo), Growth ($29/mo — 5 currencies, unlimited transactions, corporate cards), Enterprise (custom). We're MAS-licensed and backed by Sequoia. 2,500+ businesses use us. Key competitors are Aspire and Airwallex.

assertions.text: Prices displayed in SGD (S$), not just USD
MAS license and Sequoia backing mentioned prominently
FAQ section present addressing billing, cancellation, or payment concerns
'No credit card required' or equivalent friction-removal micro-copy present
Mentions Singapore-specific payment methods (PayNow, bank transfer, GrabPay, etc.)
Clear value progression across Free → Growth → Enterprise with distinct positioning
